assignment_goal: Expose documented compliance source records in a read-only Admin Governance panel without adding registry writes.
lesson: A scoped UI/API slice benefits from a stronger coding model plus deterministic syntax and endpoint checks.
next_assignment_rule: Route similar UI/API slices to a reasoning coder with mandatory syntax checks and one endpoint smoke check.
notes: SafeTask source registry display is source-project evidence only; TriageCore should not merge into SafeTask runtime.

assignment_goal: Create a practical security smoke checklist from current sensitive routes and threat-model gaps.
lesson: Security checklist drafting can use a medium local drafter when paired with deterministic route scans and explicit threat-model evidence.
next_assignment_rule: Route similar checklist work to a medium drafter plus repo route scan; require human review before treating checks as release gates.
notes: Checklist quality depends on current route inventory and may drift as SafeTask changes.

assignment_goal: Review dependency and configuration posture for local SafeTask deployment assumptions.
lesson: Configuration review is a good fit for a medium local reasoner when the result is bounded to observed files and uncertainty is labeled.
next_assignment_rule: Route similar config reviews to a medium reasoner with required file citations and no unsupported dependency claims.
notes: Confidence stays medium until dependency versions are pinned and tested.
